title: Keep token basis residual, remove graph residual

queries: token-level residual alignment graph prompting llm tabular reasoning
graph-level prompt residual ablation basis alignment language model

evidence.why_now: Basis-loss-only failed, so the next narrower hypothesis is that only graph-level basis residuals are harmful while token residuals may still help.

hypothesis: Removing only graph-level basis residual injection may recover cross-task stability while preserving token-level basis guidance.
notes: user-ltv improved, item-incoterms was neutral, but user-churn regressed below the strict screening baseline.
